ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the study */,
  "master_ref" TEXT /* Master reference number */,
  "pubmed_id" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the study */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the study was published */,
  "primary_author" TEXT /* Primary author of the study */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the study was published */,
  "volume_issue" TEXT /* Volume and issue of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the study */,
  "priority_journal" TEXT /* Whether the study is a priority journal */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g. Randomized Controlled Trial, Observational Study) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g. Published, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of the intervention */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the intervention belongs to */,
  "intervention_description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "intervention_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the intervention (in weeks or months) */,
  "intervention_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the intervention (e.g. Daily, Weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the outcome belongs to */,
  "study_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the study (e.g. QALY, DALY, Both) */,
  "study_country" TEXT /* Country where the study was conducted */,
  "disease_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the disease studied */,
  "max_target_age" INTEGER /* Maximum target age of the study population */,
  "min_target_age" INTEGER /* Minimum target age of the study population */,
  "target_genders" TEXT /* Genders of the study population */,
  "review" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g. Full, Partial) */,
  "time_horizon" TEXT /* Time horizon of the study (e.g. Lifetime) */,
  "outcome_measure" TEXT /* Measure of the outcome (e.g. Mean, Median) */,
  "outcome_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the outcome (e.g. Years, Quality-Adjusted Life Years) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_characteristics" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the population belongs to */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the study population */,
  "population_age_mean" REAL /* Mean age of the study population */,
  "population_age_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the age of the study population */,
  "population_gender" TEXT /* Genders of the study population */,
  "population_comorbidities" TEXT /* Comorbidities present in the study population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_characteristics_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_effectiveness_analysis" (
  "cea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost-effectiveness analysis */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the cost-effectiveness analysis belongs to */,
  "cea_method" TEXT /* Method used for the cost-effectiveness analysis (e.g. Markov model, Decision tree) */,
  "cea_time_horizon" TEXT /* Time horizon of the cost-effectiveness analysis (e.g. Lifetime) */,
  "cea_discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate used in the cost-effectiveness analysis */,
  "cea_cost" REAL /* Cost of the intervention */,
  "cea_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the intervention */,
  "cea_icr" REAL /* Incremental cost-effectiveness ratio (ICER) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_effectiveness_analysis_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the author belongs to */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_authors_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the funding source belongs to */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the keyword belongs to */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_keywords_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
